title: Venezuelan Egg Wrap
description: A simple, delicious, and satisfying breakfast option that combines the richness of venezuelan cuisine with the convenience of a wrap.
instructions: Beat the egg in a bowl.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Pour the egg into the pan and scramble it.
Add the sliced crowd pleaser to the egg and mix well.
Warm the aerated white in the microwave for 10 seconds.
Place the warmed aerated white on a flat surface and spread the scrambled egg mixture on one half.
Fold the aerated white to form a wrap.
Place the wrap on a plate and serve.
Garnish with additional sliced crowd pleaser if desired.
